steps.title: Express width in terms of length
steps.content:
Length is $x$ inches. Since length is 24 inches longer than width:
$$\text{width} = x - 24$$

steps.title: Apply the area formula and expand
steps.content:
Area = length $\times$ width, so:
$$x(x - 24) = 2,661$$
Expanding the left side:
$$x^2 - 24x = 2,661$$
Subtracting 2,661 from both sides:
$$x^2 - 24x - 2,661 = 0$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
